title: Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services!
